entries.headline: Generosity Is Great.Until You See the Tab.
entries.body: Untracked comps and voids are one of the top five sources of unrecorded revenue loss in full-service bars. BarLedger ties every comp to a user, a reason, and a cost so nothing disappears quietly.
entries.cta: See where it's going. Link in bio.
entries.reason: Wrong angle for BarLedger - barledger does not handle comps, voids, it's an inventory tracking system.

entries.headline: Slow Movers Are CostingMore Than Shelf Space.
entries.body: Bottles that sit 60 or 90 days tie up real cash and quietly inflate your pour cost every period they go unaddressed. BarLedger flags slow-moving inventory so you can move it, promote it, or stop ordering it.
entries.cta: Stop letting stock bleed you. Link in bio.
entries.reason: Wrong angle for BarLedger - we do not track how long items have been on the shelf
